title: Time Fog Mechanics
description: The island is unmoored from time. A fog surrounds the island that causes time dilation - expeditions that enter the fog experience weeks, but decades may pass for those outside. The seas are only calm enough for passage twice a year when tides and trade winds disperse the fog temporarily. Returning expedition members may speak unrecognizable languages and be from expeditions sent long ago.
definition-of-done: Time fog system is implemented with configurable time dilation ratios. Safe passage windows occur on a scheduled basis. NPCs returning from the fog can be from different time periods.
testing-plan: Test that expeditions entering fog experience correct time dilation. Verify safe passage windows trigger on schedule. Test NPC generation with varied temporal origins.
todos: Build temporal origin system for returning NPCs
unknowns: How to handle player death/restart across time periods
